creator: kidon@posteo.de
text:
Created attachment 215111
Makefile.extmod.patch

The nginx-link-function module fixed a FreeBSD-related issue [1] and published a new release [2]. The attached patch increases the release number of the module.

[1] https://github.com/Taymindis/nginx-link-function/issues/14
[2] https://github.com/Taymindis/nginx-link-function/releases/tag/3.2.2
